cards.title: Apple sues OpenAI over trade secrets and hiring
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging misconduct by leadership including the chief hardware officer. The complaint claims over 400 former Apple employees now work at OpenAI.

cards.title: Patreon blocks AI scraping bots with Cloudflare
cards.body: Patreon is actively blocking bots that train AI models on creator content without permission. The shift moves beyond passive robots.txt files to aggressive bot blocking.

cards.title: GPU financiers pivot to inference chips in deals
cards.body: A $400 million chip-backed loan signals the next wave of AI infrastructure financing. The deal reflects growing focus on inference optimization beyond training hardware.

cards.title: Google Vids adds personalized AI avatar features
cards.body: Google is launching personalized AI avatars in Vids, letting users create videos starring digital versions of themselves. The update integrates Gemini Omni-powered tools for video generation and editing.

cards.title: Roblox launches AI game creation in mobile app
cards.body: Roblox's new 'Build' feature generates basic games from single text prompts. The tool democratizes game creation for mobile users.

cards.title: Google AI Mode now links to select apps
cards.body: Google is expanding AI Mode beyond Q&A to complete tasks across user apps. The update enables AI agents to interact with external services directly.

cards.title: DoorDash opens command-line ordering tool beta
cards.body: DoorDash's dd-cli lets developers and AI agents order food from the terminal. The move signals a shift toward AI-first software interfaces.

cards.title: OpenAI releases ChatGPT basketball hardware
cards.body: OpenAI launched its first hardware product this week, including a ChatGPT-branded basketball. The release marks an unusual expansion beyond software.

cards.title: Former DeepMind researcher raises at $300M valuation
cards.body: Andrew Dai, who worked on systems informing ChatGPT, raised funding at a $300M pre-seed valuation. His startup is focused on visual AI as the next frontier.

cards.title: AMI Labs CEO dismisses AGI and superintelligence claims
cards.body: Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun's world model startup, rejects 'AGI' and 'superintelligence' terminology. He argues the industry is chasing poorly-defined goals.

cards.title: Moonshot's Kimi 3 to rival Anthropic Opus
cards.body: Kimi K3 will be China's largest open AI model with 2-3 trillion parameters. The release aims to close the gap with leading Western models.

cards.title: Apple Intelligence launches in China via Alibaba, Baidu
cards.body: Apple secured deals with Alibaba and Baidu to power Apple Intelligence in China. The move follows months of negotiations for the key market.

cards.title: Applied Computing raises $20M for oil-gas AI
cards.body: Applied Computing secured Series A funding to build foundation AI models for oil, gas, and petrochemical industries. The model aims to optimize entire plant operations.

cards.title: Microsoft trains sales on model cost advantages
cards.body: Microsoft is coaching salespeople to position its AI models as more efficient alternatives to OpenAI and Anthropic. The strategy emphasizes cost-effectiveness of in-house solutions.

cards.title: OpenAI releases $230 light-up keyboard for Codex
cards.body: OpenAI launched a programmable light-up keyboard designed for its Codex agentic coding application. The release comes amid its legal battles with Apple.

cards.title: Thinking Machines debuts Inkling open model
cards.body: Thinking Machines released Inkling, its first public open model after 18 months of stealth development. The release challenges one-size-fits-all AI approaches.

cards.title: Apple's Lawsuit Threatens OpenAI's IPO Plans
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging misconduct by leadership and claiming over 400 former Apple employees work there. The timing could significantly disrupt OpenAI's planned public offering.

cards.title: Patreon Actively Blocks AI Scraping Bots
cards.body: Patreon partnered with Cloudflare to block AI bots from scraping creator content for model training. The shift moves beyond passive robots.txt blocks to active defense mechanisms.

cards.title: Google Vids Adds Personalized AI Avatars
cards.body: Google now lets users star in their own AI-generated videos using digital avatars. The feature integrates Gemini Omni tools for video generation and editing from text prompts.

cards.title: Roblox Launches Text-Prompt Game Creation
cards.body: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt. The AI-powered tool democratizes game creation for mobile app users.

cards.title: Google AI Mode Expands to App Integration
cards.body: Google's AI Mode now links and interacts with select apps beyond just answering questions. Users can complete tasks across their regularly-used applications.

cards.title: DoorDash Command-Line Tool for AI Agents
cards.body: DoorDash launched dd-cli, a beta command-line tool enabling AI agents to search stores, build carts, and place orders. The move signals software designed specifically for AI automation.

cards.title: DeepMind Researcher Raises $300M Pre-Seed
cards.body: Former DeepMind researcher Andrew Dai raised funding at $300M valuation before product launch, leveraging AI research that informed ChatGPT development. He believes visual AI represents the next frontier.

cards.title: AMI Labs CEO Rejects AGI Terminology
cards.body: Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun's world model startup AMI Labs, dismisses the term "superintelligence" despite industry hype. He takes a different philosophical stance on AI advancement.

cards.title: Moonshot's Kimi 3 to Challenge Anthropic
cards.body: China's Moonshot is launching Kimi 3, expected to be the largest open-source Chinese AI model with 2-3 trillion parameters. The model aims to close performance gaps with Anthropic's Opus 4.8.

cards.title: Apple Intelligence Launches in China
cards.body: Apple approved Apple Intelligence for Chinese launch through partnerships with Alibaba and Baidu. The deal marks significant progress for Apple's AI strategy in a major market.

cards.title: Foundation AI Model for Oil Industry
cards.body: Applied Computing raised $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for oil, gas, and petrochemical operators. The model targets entire industrial plant optimization.

cards.title: Microsoft Trains Sales Team on AI
cards.body: Microsoft is training salespeople to emphasize its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective alternatives. The strategy positions Microsoft against OpenAI and Anthropic offerings.

cards.title: OpenAI Releases $230 Keyboard for Codex
cards.body: OpenAI launched a light-up keyboard designed for its agentic coding app Codex amid ongoing legal battles with Apple. The hardware release continues OpenAI's diversification.

cards.title: Thinking Machines Releases Inkling Model
cards.body: Thinking Machines launched Inkling, its first open AI model, challenging one-size-fits-all approaches to AI development. The release marks the company's debut after 18 months of building infrastructure.

cards.title: OpenAI Builds GPT-Red AI Security Tool
cards.body: OpenAI created GPT-Red, an LLM designed to act as a "super-hacker" sparring partner for security testing. Training GPT-5.6 against GPT-Red enhanced its defenses against cyberattacks.

cards.title: Anthropic Discovers Claude's Inner Workings
cards.body: Anthropic, valued at nearly $1 trillion, published research revealing new insights into how Claude operates internally. The discovery advances understanding of AI model interpretability.

cards.title: xAI Sued Over Grok CSAM Generation
cards.body: xAI is facing lawsuits from users regarding Grok's ability to generate child sexual abuse material. The company moved to legal action after denying the capability.

cards.title: Linus Torvalds Defends AI Coding in Linux
cards.body: Linus Torvalds told AI critics to "fork it" or leave the Linux project. His stance supports integrating AI tools into Linux development despite skepticism.
